hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight leading-none
hierarchy.caption: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium

typography.guidelines: Headings must use tight tracking and light/normal weights to emphasize elegance. Overlines and small labels must be uppercase with wide tracking (0.2em). Never use pure white for text; always use soft cream (#FDFBF7).

spacing_and_layout.grid: Use Asymmetrical bento grids for galleries and experience sections. Avoid perfect symmetry to create tension and artful layouts.
spacing_and_layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for section paddings. Let elements breathe.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Max width 7xl (max-w-7xl) with px-6 or px-8 for mobile/tablet paddings.

visual_effects.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border border-white/10 shadow-2xl. Use this for sticky navbars, modal overlays, and premium floating cards.
visual_effects.noise: Apply a subtle noise/grain texture overlay (opacity 5-10%) on dark backgrounds to make the black feel like velvet.
visual_effects.shadows: Replace harsh drop shadows with ambient glows. Example: shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(6,78,59,0.2)] for a soft emerald glow behind featured items.
visual_effects.gradients: Subtle, slow-moving radial or liquid gradients using the dark emerald and black.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black border border-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-transparent hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm px-8 py-4
buttons.outline: bg-transparent text-[#D4AF37] border border-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm px-8 py-4
buttons.magnetic: Wrap buttons in a Framer Motion magnetic hover effect to pull slightly towards the cursor.

cards.hover: 3D tilt on hover using Framer Motion, with the border transitioning to border-[#D4AF37]/30.

components.navbar: Sticky at the top. Starts transparent, transitions to Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) on scroll.
components.cursor: Custom cursor required: A small gold dot (#D4AF37) that follows the mouse instantly, accompanied by a larger hollow circle that trails behind. Use mix-blend-mode: difference where applicable.

animation_guidelines.page_transitions: Slide up (y: 20 -> 0) and fade in (opacity: 0 -> 1) with easeOut transition.
animation_guidelines.scroll_animations: Staggered fade up for text blocks. Parallax effect for hero images and large background images.
animation_guidelines.loading: Full-screen luxury loading animation. Deep black background, minimal gold line drawing or text revealing slowly before mounting the page.

pages.name: Home
pages.layout: Immersive full-screen hero with parallax background. Animated heading revealing word-by-word. Bento grid for 'Featured Story' and 'Signature Dishes'. Parallax banner transitioning into the reservations CTA.

pages.name: Menu
pages.layout: Elegant interactive category filtering (Starters, Mains, Desserts, Cocktails). Use 3D hover tilt cards for menu items. Include 'Chef Recommended' badges in gold. Background features a dark emerald liquid gradient.

pages.name: Experience & Ambience
pages.layout: Editorial-style asymmetrical layout. Large typography intersecting with high-quality interior images. Statistics/Facts (e.g., '15+ Years Michelin Experience') presented in large gold numbers.

pages.name: Gallery
pages.layout: Masonry grid layout mixing portrait and landscape shots. Images expand into a full-screen lightbox on click.

pages.name: Reservations
pages.layout: Split layout: Left side features a sticky cinematic image of the restaurant interior. Right side features a premium, step-by-step reservation form inside a glassmorphism container.

pages.name: About/Story
pages.layout: Timeline layout showcasing the origin of the restaurant, philosophy of vegetarian fine dining, and chef profiles.

pages.name: Events, Testimonials, Blog, Contact
pages.layout: Clean, grid-based layouts maintaining the dark luxury aesthetic. Contact page must include a dark-mode styled map embed.

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract dark green and gold liquid texture for background
Stunning abstract marbling pattern in green and gold

food_and_drinks.description: Atmospheric shot of a smoky artisan cocktail

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a production-ready, multi-page website using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.
Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' fonts are imported from Google Fonts in the global CSS or index.html.
Do not use generic Shadcn components out-of-the-box. Customize them heavily to match the luxury aesthetic, stripping away the 'Vercel-look'.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling across the entire application.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states (e.g., text color changes to gold, borders highlight).
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all buttons, links, and forms for testing purposes.
Build the custom cursor exactly as described: gold dot with trailing hollow circle.
Never use placeholder image URLs. Use the provided high-quality image URLs from the 'image_urls' object.
